# SCORE Articles Library

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, articles, education

## Resource purpose
SCORE article library for topic-specific business education.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the user needs readable, topic-specific educational content but not a full template, tool, webinar, or mentor referral.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Best audience
Entrepreneurs seeking general education on a specific business topic.

## BOSS routing notes
- Narrow article recommendations by BOSS stage and primary need.
- Pair article recommendations with a mentor when the topic is complex, risky, or stage-sensitive.

## Related SCORE links
- SCORE resources: https://www.score.org/resources/
- SCORE templates: https://www.score.org/templates/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
